queries.question: What is the salary for a position that is common to all hospitals?
queries.sql: SELECT MedicalRoles.Salary  from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)

queries.question: What roles do all hospitals have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT MedicalRoles.RoleName  from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)

queries.question: Show me the roles every hospital has.
queries.sql: select hospitals.name , medicalroles.rolename from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?rolename WHERE {
  ?hospitals_medical_roles a :Hospitals_Medical_Roles .
  ?medicalroles a :MedicalRoles .
  ?hospitals_medical_roles p:hasMedicalRoles ?medicalroles .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals_medical_roles p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?medicalroles p:RoleName ?rolename .
}

queries.question: For each hospital, show me the salaries of the roles there.
queries.sql: select hospitals.name , medicalroles.salary from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?salary WHERE {
  ?hospitals_medical_roles a :Hospitals_Medical_Roles .
  ?medicalroles a :MedicalRoles .
  ?hospitals_medical_roles p:hasMedicalRoles ?medicalroles .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals_medical_roles p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?medicalroles p:Salary ?salary .
}

queries.question: What name and salary combinations do we have for medical roles that are common to all hospitals
queries.sql: SELECT MedicalRoles.RoleName, MedicalRoles.Salary  from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)

queries.question: For all hospitals, show me the names and salaries of all the medical roles they have.
queries.sql: select hospitals.name , medicalroles.rolename , medicalroles.salary from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?rolename ?salary WHERE {
  ?hospitals_medical_roles a :Hospitals_Medical_Roles .
  ?medicalroles a :MedicalRoles .
  ?hospitals_medical_roles p:hasMedicalRoles ?medicalroles .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals_medical_roles p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?medicalroles p:RoleName ?rolename .
  ?medicalroles p:Salary ?salary .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the salary of a role that each hospital has?
Show me the roles every hospital has.
What name and salary do we have in medical roles for every hospital
